name: darktracex-console
description: Local defensive cybersecurity assistant with offline knowledge and Ollama support.

scripts.check:py: python3 -m py_compile server.py auto_learn.py build_learning_digest.py bulk_audit.py batch_url_reports.py train_defense_models.py train_site_exposure_model.py train_site_exposure_lstm.py train_site_exposure_gnn.py train_all_site_models.py generate_synthetic_site_training_data.py generate_website_knowledge_corpus.py site_exposure_gnn.py generate_code_examples.py generate_attack_knowledge.py generate_attack_playbooks.py generate_cve_playbooks.py generate_ml_training_data.py generate_phishing_examples.py
scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run lint:js && npm run check:py && npm run format:check
